title: NotationEvent
description: One workflow transition on a notation. The full audit trail of a notation's lifecycle is its state_history array of these events. A notation is closed when its last event has toState == 'END'.

fromState.description: State we were in when this event was recorded. Must be a key in template.workflow.

condition.description: Condition that triggered the transition. Must be a key in template.workflow[fromState].

toState.description: Resulting state after the transition. Derived from the workflow and validated against template.workflow[fromState][condition] on write.

at.description: When this event occurred. Encoded as TimeInterval since the Swift reference date (2001-01-01 UTC), matching JSONEncoder's default Date strategy.

note.description: Optional human-readable note. Omitted when nil.

addressID.description: The address involved in this event, set on mailroom send/receive events. References addresses.id. Omitted when nil.

documentURL.description: The URL of the rendered document, set on document generation events. Omitted when nil.

NotationActor.title: NotationActor
NotationActor.description: Who triggered this transition. References a real database row — staff are person actors and their role is enforced by the service layer.
